description_long: This kiosk is a rectangular, box-like structure with a flat, light gray roof and wood-textured side panels. The front facade features a large cutout archway and a circular service window, with a printed sign and a logo on the upper right. Green, patterned vertical strips reinforce the corners and edges, adding a decorative and possibly protective element. The sides and rear are mostly plain wood, with the green strips continuing along the edges. The overall design is simple and functional, with a modern, eco-friendly aesthetic and clear access for customer interaction at the front.
description: A modern, rectangular kiosk with a flat gray roof, wood-textured panels, and green patterned corner strips, featuring a front service window and signage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the service window, archway cutout, printed sign, and logo on the right, with green patterned strips on the corners.
description_view_1: Left rear view showing a plain wood-textured panel and green corner strips, with no windows or signage visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a large, uninterrupted wood-textured panel and green corner strips, with no openings or signage.
description_view_3: Right rear view showing the plain wood-textured side and green corner strips, with a partial view of the front service area.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign and logo on the front facade, above and to the right of the service window.
attribute_window_presence: One circular service window on the front facade.
attribute_door_configuration: One open archway entry on the front facade.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof, light gray in color, with no visible overhangs or decorative elements.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern with minimalist and eco-friendly influences.
